application.title: DEVTOOLS GRIST CUSTOM WIDGET
application.description: 📦 CLI tool for rapid local prototyping and deployment of Grist custom widgets using Vite.js.

options.verbose_description: Display detailed logs and execution steps
options.clear_description: Clear the console screen before running

dev.description: Launch the Grist custom widget development environment.
dev.ready: Grist custom widget development environment is ready!

shutdown_success.item_0: Houston, we have... a completely successfully shutdown!
shutdown_success.item_1: I felt a great disturbance in the Force... as if millions of lines of code were suddenly silenced.
shutdown_success.item_2: Free your mind... and your memory. Connection to the Matrix severed.
shutdown_success.item_3: Hasta la vista, baby. System powering off.
shutdown_success.item_4: No bytes were harmed in the making of this session!
shutdown_success.item_5: Clean shutdown. Thanks for avoiding `kill -9` this time.
shutdown_success.item_6: Closing faster than my own shadow.
shutdown_success.item_7: Successful shutdown. I would even go as far as to say: the application stopped cleanly!
shutdown_success.item_8: Blistering barnacles! The script stopped without a single error!

dev.error_stopping_vite: Error stopping Vite local web server.
dev.error_unexpected: An unexpected error occurred in dev command.
dev.error_timeout_docker: Docker containers down command was forcefully terminated with SIGKILL after timeout.
dev.error_signal_docker: Docker containers command was terminated by signal: {{signal}}.
dev.error_failed_docker: Failed to stop Docker containers automatically.
dev.option_vite_port: Port for the Vite.js local server [default: {{default}}]
dev.option_grist_port: Port for the Grist Docker container [default: {{default}}]

build.detailed_help:
The build process supports two distinct architectural strategies:

  {{boldDim}}STANDARD{{reset}} (default)
    Implements advanced code-splitting with cache-busting assets. Third-party
    libraries are isolated into separate 'vendor' chunks to maximize browser
    caching efficiency and optimize load times.

  {{boldDim}}SPA{{reset}}
    Builds the widget as a true Single Page Application. All compiled JavaScript
    and CSS styles are directly inlined into a single, self-contained HTML file.
build.option_strategy: Set the build strategy (Values: STANDARD, SPA) [default: {{default}}]

config.description: Manages application preferences using the following actions (get, set, list).

actions.set: To set a value for a given key
actions.list: To list all keys and values

fields.lang: The display language of the application CLI.
fields.clearBeforeRunning: Automatically clears the terminal screen before running the application CLI.
